item.title: 随着中国雄心壮志不断扩大，人民币融资规模创下2000亿美元的历史新高
item.description: 人民币融资从未像现在这样受欢迎，越来越多的国家和外国企业正积极进入这个市场，这表明中国推动本币国际化的努力正在取得成效。【原文：Yuan financing has never been as popular as it is now, with more countries and foreign companies tapping the market, in a sign that China’s ambition to internationalize its currency is bearing fruit.】

item.title: 美国证券交易委员会终止对加密货币亿万富翁孙宇晨的诉讼
item.description: 美国证券交易委员会将终止对加密货币亿万富翁孙宇晨的诉讼。【原文：The US Securities and Exchange Commission will end its lawsuit against crypto billionaire Justin Sun.】

item.title: 奈飞进军播客领域在YouTube上的表现如何
item.description: 与去年同期相比，Netflix独家播客创作者的频道增长速度最高下降了50%。【原文：Podcasters exclusive to Netflix are seeing their channel growth slow by as much as 50% compared to the year prior】

item.title: Anthropic五角大楼纠纷加速其消费端布局
item.description: 克劳德制造商在普通用户中获得新动力，而其企业业务正面临压力。【原文：The Claude maker gains new traction with everyday users while its enterprise business is under pressure】

item.title: 伊朗战争凸显高端防空系统局限性，安杜瑞尔高管称
item.description: 安杜里尔工业公司首席战略官指出，与伊朗的冲突凸显了现有高端防空系统在应对持续涌来的廉价敌方导弹、无人机和制导炸弹时的局限性。【原文：The conflict with Iran has underscored the limitations of relying on existing high-end air defense systems against sustained waves of cheaper enemy missiles, drones and guided bombs, the chief strategy officer of defense technology company Anduril Industries Inc. said.】

item.title: 联邦调查局在其计算机网络上发现“可疑”活动
item.description: 联邦调查局周四表示，其计算机系统中发现了"可疑"活动，但未透露更多细节。【原文：The FBI said Thursday that it had found “suspicious” activity on its computer systems, but didn’t provide further details.】

item.title: 亚马逊在线商店在美国部分用户中出现故障
item.description: 亚马逊公司网站及移动应用于周四出现故障，部分用户使用时遭遇产品列表和结账选项等关键功能显示错误页面的情况。【原文：Amazon.com Inc.’s website and mobile app malfunctioned for some users on Thursday, with critical features like product listings and checkout options producing error pages.】

item.title: 众议院委员会推进Meta、谷歌在线儿童安全规则
item.description: 众议院一个关键委员会周四推进了一系列旨在改善儿童网络安全的法案，为美国在各国竞相为未成年人制定社交媒体新保护措施之际采取的轻触式监管注入了新动力。【原文：A key House committee on Thursday advanced a package of bills aimed at improving children’s safety online, injecting fresh momentum for a light-touch US effort as countries race to create new protections for minors on social media.】

item.title: 沙特阿拉伯上调对亚洲石油价格，伊朗战争搅动市场
item.description: 沙特阿拉伯将4月份亚洲买家主要原油等级价格上调幅度创2022年8月以来新高，因中东冲突持续升级以及霍尔木兹海峡这一航运要冲实质性关闭，导致能源市场剧烈震荡。【原文：Saudi Arabia raised the price of its main oil grade for buyers in Asia for April by the most since August 2022 as the widening Middle East conflict and effective closure of the shipping chokepoint at the Strait of Hormuz upend energy markets.】

item.title: 优步招聘启事暗示将更专注于司机订阅服务
item.description: 优步科技公司的一则招聘启事显示，这家网约车巨头正加紧在全球范围内为更多司机测试订阅服务，此前一些小型初创企业已通过这种替代模式取得成功。【原文：An Uber Technologies Inc. job posting suggests the rideshare company is stepping up efforts to test a subscription offering for more of its drivers around the world, following smaller upstarts that have found success with this alternative model.】

item.title: 秘鲁天然气危机危及其引以为傲的通胀控制记录
item.description: 秘鲁作为拉丁美洲主要经济体中通胀率最低的国家，如今正面临新的考验——国内天然气危机可能推高消费价格。【原文：Peru’s days of having the slowest inflation among Latin America’s big economies is facing a new test as a domestic natural gas crisis threatens to push consumer prices higher.】

item.title: 瑞银集团在创纪录的一年里将麦凯的短期奖金几乎翻了一番
item.description: 加拿大皇家银行首席执行官戴夫·麦凯去年获得总额2376万加元（约合1730万美元）的薪酬，其中包含的短期奖金比其目标高出86%，这得益于该行创纪录的盈利表现。【原文：Royal Bank of Canada Chief Executive Officer Dave McKay received C$23.76 million ($17.3 million) in total compensation last year, a pay package that included a short-term bonus that was 86% above his target as the firm achieved record earnings.】

item.title: 阿根廷高官因重返市场计划搁浅辞职
item.description: 阿根廷财政部长上周因在国际资本市场融资计划上发生分歧而辞职，凸显了总统哈维尔·米莱正逐步放弃重启华尔街融资渠道的努力。【原文：Argentina’s finance secretary resigned last week after clashing over plans to raise funds in international capital markets, highlighting President Javier Milei’s shift away from a push to restore access to Wall Street financing.】

item.title: 哥伦比亚大亨投资地质公园公司，借此进入委内瑞拉石油市场
item.description: 哥伦比亚首富海梅·吉林斯基及其子加布里埃尔·吉林斯基向拉丁美洲独立油气生产商GeoPark有限公司投资1.07亿美元，旨在借此切入委内瑞拉复苏中的石油产业。【原文：Colombia’s richest man Jaime Gilinski and his son Gabriel Gilinski invested $107 million in Latin America independent oil and gas producer GeoPark Ltd., envisioning a vehicle to enter Venezuela’s recovering oil sector.】

item.title: 美元有望创2022年以来最佳周表现，就业数据即将公布
item.description: 在美军对伊朗发动袭击引发避险情绪后，美元正迎来逾三年来的最佳周表现，交易员们正将目光投向周五的就业报告，以判断美元涨势能否延续。【原文：The dollar is heading for its best week in more than three years after the US strike on Iran triggered a flight to safety, and traders are turning to Friday’s jobs report to see whether the rally will continue.】

item.title: 债券交易员认为美联储今年不降息的可能性正在增加
item.description: 债券期权交易员正日益押注美联储今年将放弃任何降息举措，因中东地区冲突加剧推高油价，并可能推升通胀。【原文：Bond options traders are increasingly betting that the Federal Reserve will forgo any rate cuts this year, as an intensifying conflict in the Middle East boosts oil prices and threatens to push up inflation.】

item.title: 美国原油价格首次突破每桶80美元，创2025年1月以来新高
item.description: 随着中东冲突加剧导致原油供应中断，全球主要买家受到冲击，油价大幅攀升。作为最大原油进口国的中国正努力节约燃料，而伊朗、美国和以色列则誓言继续推进军事行动。【原文：Oil surged as the deepening conflict in the Middle East disrupted crude flows to key buyers, with top importer China seeking to conserve fuel as Iran and the US and Israel vowed to press on with hostilities.】

item.title: 五角大楼称已告知Anthropic公司其存在供应链风险
item.description: 五角大楼表示，已正式通知Anthropic PBC公司，认为这家人工智能公司及其产品对美国供应链构成风险，一位高级国防官员如是说。【原文：The Pentagon said it has formally notified Anthropic PBC that it’s deemed the artificial intelligence company and its products a risk to the US supply chain, according to a senior defense official.】

item.title: OpenAI发布新金融服务工具，与Anthropic展开竞争
item.description: OpenAI正推出一款全新旗舰人工智能模型及金融服务工具套件，旨在更高效地处理办公事务，从而加剧与Anthropic PBC的竞争——后者正因与五角大楼的对峙面临新风险。【原文：OpenAI is releasing a new flagship artificial intelligence model and a suite of financial-services tools that are meant to be better at tackling office work, ramping up competition with Anthropic PBC as the rival firm faces new risks from a showdown with the Pentagon.】

item.title: 甲骨文计划裁员数千人以应对人工智能资金短缺
item.description: 甲骨文公司正计划裁减数千个岗位，这是该公司为应对大规模人工智能数据中心扩张计划引发的现金短缺问题所采取的举措之一。【原文：Oracle Corp. is planning to ax thousands of jobs, among its moves to handle a cash crunch from a massive AI data center expansion effort.】

item.title: 美国拟定规则，对英伟达全球销售实施全面监管
item.description: 英伟达公司长期以来一直是全球人工智能领域的造王者。如今，特朗普政府正考虑在该行业中扮演正式角色，其权力范围将同样广泛。【原文：Nvidia Corp. has long been the world’s AI kingmaker. Now, the Trump administration is considering taking a formal role in the industry that would include similarly sweeping powers.】

item.title: 五角大楼与Anthropic的争端凸显人工智能在大规模监控中的作用
item.description: 人类中心主义的PBC公司与五角大楼的冲突，正引发人们对一项监管宽松的实践的新关注：美国政府采购商业可得信息（如浏览记录和位置数据），并日益借助人工智能进行大规模分析。【原文：Anthropic PBC’s clash with the Pentagon is drawing fresh attention to a lightly regulated practice: the US government’s purchase of commercially available information, such as browsing histories and location data, and the growing use of artificial intelligence to analyze it at scale.】

item.title: 伊朗战争引发通胀担忧，低于6%的抵押贷款利率消失殆尽
item.description: 上周美国购房者必须迅速行动，才能抢到三年多来首次低于6%的抵押贷款利率。如今利率已回升，而中东新冲突的爆发可能进一步推高利率。【原文：US homebuyers had to act fast last week to nab the first sub-6% mortgage rates in more than three years. Now they’re up, and the new conflict in the Middle East threatens to nudge them higher.】

item.title: 欧洲央行行长拉加德称，全球大国必须合作，否则将自食其果
item.description: 欧洲央行行长克里斯蒂娜·拉加德敦促全球领导人制定一套"基本行为准则"，以促进各国间合作。当前，技术创新需要各国携手共进，而地缘政治分裂则会带来高昂代价。【原文：European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde urged global leaders to find a “basic code of conduct” to work with each other at a time when technological innovation needs cooperation and geopolitical fragmentation carries high costs.】

item.title: 特朗普正撤销其力推的交易，油价、收益率与美元齐涨
item.description: 在与伊朗的冲突爆发之前，唐纳德·特朗普总统——无论是有意为之还是偶然——似乎在三个关键金融市场都获得了他想要的结果：油价和国债收益率走低，美元走弱。【原文：Until the conflict with Iran broke out, President Donald Trump was getting — by design or by chance — what he appeared to want in three pivotal financial markets: lower oil prices and Treasury yields, and a weaker dollar.】

item.title: 隆重推出FedLock：利用大型语言模型衡量美联储言论的新方法
item.description: 看看这个。【原文：Check it out.】

item.title: 联邦调查局逮捕一名承包商，其涉嫌从法警处窃取加密货币
item.description: 约翰·达吉塔，一名被指控从美国法警局窃取价值逾4600万美元加密货币的政府承包商，于周三深夜在加勒比海圣马丁岛被捕。【原文：John Daghita, a government contractor accused of stealing more than $46 million in cryptocurrency from the US Marshals Service, was arrested late Wednesday on the island of Saint Martin in the Caribbean.】

item.title: ChatGPT遭遇强烈反弹，揭示与特朗普结盟的新隐患
item.description:
在与五角大楼的争端中，竞争对手AI工具Claude的下载量激增。

【原文：

Downloads of rival AI tool Claude soar amid feud with the Pentagon.

】

item.title: 美国气象局在改革计划中瞄准人工智能升级
item.description: 美国国家气象局的主管机构计划在未来数月内重组为精简架构，同时优先推进先进气象模型的研发工作。【原文：The US science agency that oversees the National Weather Service plans to prioritize the development of advanced weather models while reorganizing into a leaner structure in the months ahead.】

item.title: 奈飞收购本·阿弗莱克创立的人工智能电影制作公司
item.description: 网飞公司收购了由演员本·阿弗莱克四年前创立的人工智能电影制作技术公司InterPositive。【原文：Netflix Inc. acquired InterPositive, an AI filmmaking technology business founded four years ago by actor Ben Affleck.】
